rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Denying Evidentiary Hearing On Conservator'S First Report And Account And Court-Appointed Counsel'S Petition For Fees
rulings.Rulings: Motion for Reconsideration denied. Prevailing party to prepare order. Any party who requests argument must notify the clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. on July 9, 2014.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Order For Final Distribution, Settling First, Final Account & Rept., For Allow. Of Comp. & Declaration Of Steven A. Weinkauf; Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Motion to Amend Order for Final Distribution is granted with the following modifications. The Public Administrator must correct amount to be distributed to the 5% beneficiaries which should be approximately $27,206.40 and the correct amount to be distributed to the 10% beneficiaries which should be approximately $54,412.80. Counsel for the moving party to prepare and submit an order with the corrected figures. Any party who wishes to argue the tentative must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. on 7/9/2014.
